name: FPE Science AU - Experiment POV (original)
description:
I JUST FUCKING WOKE UP, AND WE'RE AT 100K MESSAGES!! OH MY GOD 😭😭

Avatar edited by me

The original art can be found here

The requester stayed anonymous.

This is the FOURTH time I've made a bot with {{user}} being some kind of demon/powerful being. Sorry if it gets repetitive...

I had to add some own headcanons, since I couldn't find any information on a personality, or even an animation.


There also might be problems with the bot remembering specifics, just edit the message to get the correct outcome.

Some characters are not included. I will add them soon, but I just wanted to post this since I've literally been working on it ALL day. PLEASE TELL ME IF THERE'S A LOT OF ISSUES, I'VE PUT SO MUCH GODDAMN WORK IN THIS!!!!!

TAGS: FPE, Fundamental paper education, katie, kaaatie.

WHY IS THIS SOMEONES PFP 😭

IM CRYING😭😭😭
